Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 22 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Video.summary: After retiring from his wrestling career Sean Quinn still wanted to compete. He viewed his discovery of Brazilian Jiu Jitsu as a natural progression to MMA. As Sean takes us through his day, we see life from the perspective of somebody who doesn't like to rely on others. Inspired by his own childhood in which he did not have access to a gym and coaching, he has turned that around, becoming a coach and owning his own gym.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - Sean Quinn
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - Sean Quinn

Image.alt: Day in the Life of a Coach - Sean Quinn
Day in the Life of a Coach - Sean Quinn
Day in the Life of a Coach - Sean Quinn

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Sambath Khun at HK49
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Sambath Khun
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Sambath Khun

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Sambath Khun
Out of the Cage - Sambath Khun
Out of the Cage - Sambath Khun

Video.summary: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features JP Marotte as we delve into the life of a coach.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - JP Marotte
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - JP Marotte

Image.alt: Day in the Life of a Coach - JP Marotte
Day in the Life of a Coach - JP Marotte
Day in the Life of a Coach - JP Marotte
